{{Short description|Men's association football team}}
{{About|the men's team|the women's team|Aruba women's national football team}}
{{Use dmy dates|date=November 2023}}
{{Infobox National football team
| Name                = Aruba
| Badge               = 
| Badge_size          = 180px
| Nickname            =
| Association         = [[Aruba Football Federation|Arubaanse Voetbal Bond]] (AVB)
| Confederation       = [[CONCACAF]] (North America)
| Sub-confederation   = [[Caribbean Football Union|CFU]] (Caribbean)
| Coach               = [[Marvic Bermúdez]]
| Most caps           = [[Nickenson Paul]] (36)
| Top scorer          = [[Rovien Ostiana]] (8)
| Captain             = [[Fernando Lewis]]
| Home Stadium        = [[Trinidad Stadium]]
| FIFA Trigramme      = ARU
| FIFA Rank           = {{FIFA World Rankings|ARU}}
| FIFA max            = 112
| FIFA max date       = November 2015
| FIFA min            = 205
| FIFA min date       = April 2021
| Elo Rank            = {{nowrap|{{World Football Elo Ratings|Aruba}}}}
| Elo max             = 50
| Elo max date        = 1924
| Elo min             = 203
| Elo min date        = April 2020
| pattern_la1         = _aru21h
| pattern_b1          = _aru21h
| pattern_ra1         = _aru21h
| pattern_sh1         = _aru21h
| leftarm1            = 1a86ff
| body1               = FFF200
| rightarm1           = 1a86ff
| shorts1             = FFF200
| socks1              = FFF200
| pattern_la2         = _thinblueborder
| pattern_b2          = _aru1819a
| pattern_ra2         = _thinblueborder
| pattern_sh2         = _white_stripes
| pattern_so2         = 
| leftarm2            = FFFFFF
| body2               = 0000FF
| rightarm2           = FFFFFF
| shorts2             = 0000FF
| socks2              = 0000FF
| First game          = {{flagicon|NED}} '''Aruba''' 0–4 {{fb-rt|Territory of Curaçao}}<br>([[Aruba]]; 6 April 1924)<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.rsssf.org/tablesa/aruba-intres.html|title=Aruba - List of International Matches|website=[[RSSSF]]|publisher=Rec.Sport Soccer Statistics Foundation|access-date=17 November 2010|archive-date=11 August 2022|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20220811173513/https://www.rsssf.org/tablesa/aruba-intres.html|url-status=live}}</ref><br>'''''as modern Aruba'''''<br>{{fb|TRI}} 7–0 {{fb-rt|ARU}}<br>([[Netherlands Antilles]]; 31 March 1989)<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.international-football.net/search-matches?team=Aruba&page=2|title=Aruba national team|website=international-football.net|access-date=25 March 2022|archive-date=29 May 2022|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20220529112909/https://www.international-football.net/search-matches?team=Aruba&page=2|url-status=live}}</ref>
| Largest win         = {{flagicon|NED}} '''Aruba''' 8–1 [[Suriname national football team|Suriname]] {{flagicon|NED}}<br>([[Surinam (Dutch colony)|Surinam]]; 6 June 1946)<br>'''''as modern Aruba'''''<br>{{fb|ARU}} 7–0 {{Fb-rt|VGB}}<br>([[Oranjestad]], Aruba; 1 June 2014)
| Largest loss        = {{flagicon|NED}} '''Aruba''' 0–9 {{fb|HUN}}<br>([[Netherlands Antilles]]; 12 December 1982)<br>'''''as modern Aruba'''''<br>{{fb|TRI}} 11–0 {{fb-rt|ARU}}<br>([[Arima]], Trinidad and Tobago; 23 April 1989)
| World cup apps      = 
| World cup first     = 
| World cup best      = 
| Regional name       = 
| Regional cup apps   = 
| Regional cup first  = 
| Regional cup best   = 
| 2ndRegional name    = [[CCCF Championship]]
| 2ndRegional cup apps = 1
| 2ndRegional cup first = [[1955 CCCF Championship|1955]]
| 2ndRegional cup best = Fifth place ([[1955 CCCF Championship|1955]])
}}

The '''Aruba national football team'''  ({{langx|nl|Arubaans voetbalelftal}}; {{langx|pap|selekshon di futbòl Aruba}}) represents [[Aruba]] ([[Kingdom of the Netherlands#Constituent countries|constituent country of the Kingdom of the Netherlands]] in the [[Dutch Caribbean]]) in men's international [[Association football|football]], which is governed by the [[Aruba Football Federation|Arubaanse Voetbal Bond]] ({{langx|en|Aruba Football Federation}}) founded in 1932. It has been a member of [[FIFA]] and [[CONCACAF]] since 1988. Regionally, it is a member of [[Caribbean Football Union|CFU]] in the Caribbean Zone.

Aruba has never qualified for the FIFA World Cup, but has participated twice in League B and twice in League C of the CONCACAF Nations League. 

Aruba's debut in international competitions was in the [[1955 CCCF Championship]]. Their first appearance in World Cup qualifiers was in the [[1998 FIFA World Cup qualification (CONCACAF)|1998 CONCACAF qualification]]. The team achieved its first victory in 1938, defeating [[Suriname national football team|Suriname]] 5–0. After its separation of the [[Netherlands Antilles national football team|Netherlands Antilles]] in 1986, the modern Aruba achieved its first victory in 1997, defeating Netherlands Antilles 2–1.

==History==
Between 1924 and 1933, Aruba only played against [[Curaçao national football team|Curaçao]], although these matches are not considered official.<ref>{{cite web |last1=Courtney |first1=Barrie |title=Aruba - List of International Matches |url=https://www.rsssf.org/tablesa/aruba-intres.html |website=RSSSF |access-date=2 February 2023 |archive-date=11 August 2022 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20220811173513/https://www.rsssf.org/tablesa/aruba-intres.html |url-status=live }}</ref> In the 1950s these matches were used to select the best players for the Netherlands Antilles team. Aruban players like [[Adriaan Brokke|Jani Brokke]] played for the Netherlands Antilles at the [[Football at the 1952 Summer Olympics|1952 Olympic Games]].<ref>{{cite web |url=https://archive.org/details/BNA-DIG-ESSONEWS-1952-06-06/mode/2up?q=%22Jani+Brokke%22 |title=Olympic Players, Helsinki Bound |website=Aruba Esso News on Coleccion Aruba, Biblioteca Nacional Aruba |date=1952-06-06 }} Group photo of the seven Aruban footballers in the Olympic team.</ref> Under the flag of the [[Curaçao Football Association]] (C.V.B.), they won gold with the Netherlands Antilles team at the [[Football at the 1950 Central American and Caribbean Games|1950 Central American and Caribbean Games]] and participated in the [[1953 CCCF Championship]].<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.olympedia.org/athletes/23874 |title=Adriaan Brokke |work=Olympedia |accessdate=2023-06-12}}</ref>

In the 1950s the A.V.B. organised friendly matches and mini tournaments on the island. Examples are the 1952 match between Aruba and football club [[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo]] (3-1)<ref>{{cite web |url=https://archive.org/details/BNA-DIG-ARUBAANSECOURANT-1952-08/page/n31/mode/2up?q=%22Jani+Brokke%22 |title=Oncena Arubano a derrota Botafago cu un score di 3-1 |website=Arubaanse Courant on Internet Archive |date=1952-08-11 |language=Papiamento }}</ref> and the 1953 series between Aruba, [[Surinam (Dutch colony)|Surinam]], [[British Guiana]] and professional club [[La Salle F.C.]] from [[Venezuela]].<ref>{{cite web |url=https://archive.org/details/ANA-DIG-THELOCAL-1953-02-14/page/4/mode/2up?q=Brokke+RCA |title=Football: Aruba Wins Interland Series |website=The Local on Internet Archive |date=1953-02-14 }} Pages 5 to 7.</ref> Aruba participated in its first tournament at the [[1955 CCCF Championship]], where they finished in 5th place. In 1958, A.V.B. and C.V.B. merged into the [[Netherlands Antillean Football Union]]. Aruba took part in the [[Netherlands Antilles national football team|Netherlands Antilles national team]] until their secession in 1986.

Following its split from the Netherlands Antilles, the [[Aruba Football Federation]] was affiliated in 1988 with [[CONCACAF]] and [[FIFA]]. Aruba entered qualifying for the [[1989 Caribbean Cup]], and in its first group match it suffered the worst defeat in its history, at the hands of [[Trinidad and Tobago national football team|Trinidad and Tobago]], which crushed them 11–0. They played their first World Cup qualifying match against the [[Dominican Republic national football team|Dominican Republic]] as part of the [[1998 FIFA World Cup qualification (CONCACAF)|1998 FIFA World Cup qualifying]]. Aruba has participated in all the qualifying tournaments for the World Cup since, without being able to get past the first qualifying round.

Aruba has also yet to qualify for the [[Caribbean Cup]]. However, they showed some progress in the preliminary round of the [[2014 Caribbean Cup]] by getting two wins against [[Turks and Caicos national football team|Turks and Caicos]] (1–0) and [[British Virgin Islands national football team|British Virgin Islands]] (7–0), the latter being the biggest victory in its history. These results allowed them to reach 120th place in the FIFA World Ranking for the month of June 2014, their best ranking to date. Following these victories, Aruba lost 2–0 against [[French Guiana national football team|French Guiana]] and were eliminated.

Aruba began their [[2018 FIFA World Cup qualification (CONCACAF)|2018 FIFA World Cup qualification]] in the second round against [[Barbados national football team|Barbados]], losing 2–0 at home and 1–0 away, however FIFA ruled that Barbados had fielded an ineligible player, giving Aruba a 3–0 second leg victory and advancing them to the third round. Despite that, in the next round they were defeated again, this time by [[Saint Vincent and the Grenadines national football team|Saint Vincent and the Grenadines]] who won 3–2 on aggregate. Aruba failed to progress in the [[2022 FIFA World Cup qualification – CONCACAF first round|2022 FIFA World Cup qualifiers]], finishing 4th in the first round. In March 2025, Aruba then travel all the way to Southeast Asia to face against [[Cambodia national football team|Cambodia]] in a friendly match which is also their first Asian opponents since 2014 against [[Guam national football team|Guam]].

==Results and fixtures==
{{main|Aruba national football team results}}

The following is a list of match results in the last 12 months, as well as any future matches that have been scheduled.

{{legend2|#CCFFCC|Win|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFCC|Draw|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFCCCC|Loss|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFFF|Fixture|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}

===2025===
{{Football box collapsible
|round      = [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification – CONCACAF second round#Group C|2026 FIFA World Cup qualification]]
|date       = 4 June
|time       = {{UTZ|17:00|-4}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|BRB}}
|score      = 1–1
|team2      = {{fb|ARU}}
|goals1     = [[Omani Leacock|Leacock]] {{goal|7|pen.}}
|goals2     = [[Diederick Luydens|Luydens]] {{goal|15}}
|stadium    = [[BFA Technical Centre]]
|location   = [[Wildey, Barbados|Wildey]], Barbados
|attendance =
|referee    = Andrew Samuel ([[Trinidad and Tobago Football Association|Trinidad and Tobago]])
|report     = [https://www.fifa.com/fifaplus/en/match-centre/match/520/288301/288302/400017744 Report (FIFA)]<br>[https://www.concacaf.com/en/world-cup-qualifying-men/game-details/?competition=3a0j0giz3c3ajw9h59evv7lqt&season=excflxj3ypj69gf2wlx7kpudw&match=4vpl5bom3wj9k4p77u015bx90 Report (CONCACAF)]
|result     = D
}}
{{Football box collapsible
| round      = [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification – CONCACAF second round#Group C|2026 FIFA World Cup qualification]]
| date       = 7 June
| time       = {{UTZ|17:00|-4}}
| team1      = {{fb-rt|ARU}}
| score      = 0–5
| team2      = {{fb|HAI}}
| report     = https://www.fifa.com/en/match-centre/match/520/288301/288302/400017742
| goals1     =
| goals2     =
*[[Danley Jean Jacques|Jean Jacques]] {{goal|29}}
*[[Frantzdy Pierrot|Pierrot]] {{goal|35}}
*[[Ruben Providence|Providence]] {{goal|61}}
*[[Duckens Nazon|Nazon]] {{goal|67}}
*[[Mondy Prunier|Prunier]] {{goal|86}}
| location   = [[Oranjestad, Aruba|Oranjestad]], Aruba
| stadium    = [[Trinidad Stadium]]
| attendance =
| referee    = [[Luis Enrique Santander]] ([[Mexican Football Federation|Mexico]])
| result     = L
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|round      = [[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]]
|date       = 12 November 
|time       = {{UTZ|19:00|-4}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|ATG}}
|score      = 0–0
|team2      = {{fb|ARU}}
|report     = https://abstvradio.com/benna-boys-set-for-international-friendlies-next-month/
|goals1     =
|goals2     =
|location   = [[North Sound]], [[Antigua and Barbuda]]
|stadium    = [[Sir Vivian Richards Stadium]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = 
|result     = D
}}
{{Football box collapsible
|round      = [[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]]
|date       = 15 November
|time       = {{UTZ|16:00|-4}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|BRB}}
|score      = 0–3
|team2      = {{fb|ARU}}
|goals1     =
|goals2     =
*[[Quinlan Poulina|Poulina]] {{goal|4}}
*[[Jaybrien Romano|Romano]] {{goal|59}}
*[[Carlito Fermina|Fermina]] {{goal|76}}
|location   = [[North Sound]], [[Antigua and Barbuda]]
|stadium    = [[Sir Vivian Richards Stadium]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = Evens Julmis ([[Bahamas Football Association|Bahamas]])
|report     = https://globalsportsarchive.com/en/soccer/match/2025-11-15/barbados-vs-aruba/3936744
|result     = W
}}

===2026===
{{football box collapsible
| round      = [[2026 FIFA Series (men's matches)|2026 FIFA Series]]
| date       = 26 March
| time       = {{UTZ|13:30|2}}
| team1      = {{fb-rt|ARU}}
| score      = 4–1
| team2      = {{fb|MAC}}
| report     = https://globalsportsarchive.com/en/soccer/match/2026-03-26/aruba-vs-macau/4103617
| goals1     = 
*[[Carlito Fermina|Fermina]] {{goal|5}}
*[[Jaybrien Romano|Romano]] {{goal|13||16}}
*[[Conner van Kilsdonk|van Kilsdonk]] {{goal|66}}
| goals2     = 
*[[Leong Ka Hang]] {{goal|88}}
| location   = [[Kigali]], Rwanda
| stadium    = [[Kigali Pelé Stadium]]
| attendance = 
| referee    = [[Samuel Uwikunda]] ([[Rwanda Football Federation|Rwanda]])
| result     = W
}}
{{football box collapsible
|round      = [[2026 FIFA Series (men's matches)|2026 FIFA Series]]
|date       = 29 March
|time       = {{UTZ|18:00|+2}}
|score      = 4–1
|report     = https://www.fifa.com/it/match-centre/match/10017/292887/292888/400021873
|team1      = {{fb-rt|ARU}}
|goals1     =
*[[Jaybrien Romano|Romano]] {{goal|18}}
*[[Gello Robertha|Robertha]] {{goal|25}}
*[[Rovien Ostiana|Ostiana]] {{sentoff|2|48|61}}
*[[Rainey Breinburg|Breinburg]] {{goal|69}}
*[[Jens Hofer|Hofer]] {{goal|90+4|o.g.}}
|team2      = {{fb|LIE}}
|goals2     =
*[[Emanuel Zünd|Zünd]] {{goal|52}}
|stadium    = [[Kigali Pelé Stadium]]
|location   = [[Kigali]], Rwanda
|attendance =
|referee    = [[Samuel Uwikunda]] ([[Rwanda Football Federation|Rwanda]])
|result     = W
}}
{{Football box collapsible
| round      = [[Exhibition game#International football|Friendly]]
| date       = 6 June
| time       = 19:30 [[Atlantic Standard Time|AST]]
| team1      = {{fb-rt|CUW}}
| score      = 4–0
| team2      = {{fb|ARU}}
| goals1     = 
*[[Joshua Brenet|Brenet]] {{goal|53}}
*[[Jeremy Antonisse|Antonisse]] {{goal|68}}
*[[Livano Comenencia|Comenencia]] {{goal|83}}
*[[Juninho Bacuna|Bacuna]] {{goal|90}}
| goals2     =
| location   = [[Willemstad]], Curaçao
| stadium    = [[Ergilio Hato Stadium]]
| attendance = 
|referee    = [[José Corporán]] ([[Dominican Football Federation|Dominican Republic]])
|result     = L
|report     = https://www.fifa.com/en/match-centre/match/cesdwwnxbc5fmajgroc0hqzy2/dezv8l0fzgcxtejl0dwmy1gyc/2m9n05frk6wimte4qrptzyxp0/ehhvq2puohnfytsjv8gwrfv2s?date=2026-06-07
}}

==Coaching history==

[[File:Rini Coolen (2009).jpg|thumb|100px|[[Rini Coolen]] became the manager of the national football team of Aruba in 2015]]

{{div col|colwidth=22em}}
*{{flagicon|Netherlands}} [[René Notten]] (1995)
*{{flagicon|Argentina}} Ángel Botta (1996)
*{{flagicon|Aruba}} Marco Rasmijn (2000)
*{{flagicon|Argentina}} Marcelo Muñoz (2004)
*{{flagicon|Netherlands}} [[Azing Griever]] (2004–2006)
*{{flagicon|Argentina}} Marcelo Muñoz (2008–2010)
*{{flagicon|Aruba}} Epi Albertus (2010–2012)
*{{flagicon|Netherlands}} [[Giovanni Franken]] (2013–2015)
*{{flagicon|Netherlands}} [[Rini Coolen]] (2015)
*{{flagicon|Netherlands}} [[Martin Koopman]] (2015–2020)
*{{flagicon|Aruba}} [[Marvic Bermúdez]] (2020)
*{{flagicon|Netherlands}} [[Stanley Menzo]] (2021–2022)
*{{flagicon|Aruba}} [[Marvic Bermúdez]] (2022–)
{{div col end}}

==Players==
{{Main|List of Aruba international footballers}}

===Current squad===
The following players were called up for the [[2026 FIFA Series (men's matches)]] matches against [[Macau national football team|Macau]] and a second opponent (to be determined between [[Liechtenstein national football team|Liechtenstein]] or [[Tanzania national football team|Tanzania]]) on 26 and 29 March 2026, respectively.<ref>{{cite Instagram|title=Squad announcement|user=arubaansevoetbalbondaruba|postid=DVtdH4UjToX|author=[[Aruba Football Federation]]|access-date=10 March 2026|date=10 March 2026}}</ref>

''Caps and goals correct as of 30 March 2026, after the match against [[Liechtenstein national football team|Liechtenstein]].''

{{nat fs g start}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Matthew Lentink]]|age={{birth date and age|1993|8|18|df=y}}|caps=22|goals=0|club=[[VV Goes|Goes]]|clubnat=NED}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Jahmani Eisden]]|age={{birth date and age|2005|7|9|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Sportlust '46]]|clubnat=NED}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Josthan Maduro]]|age={{birth date and age|2006|8|30|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[SV Britannia]]|clubnat=ARU}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Nickenson Paul]]|age={{birth date and age|1997|8|24|df=y}}|caps=35|goals=0|club=[[SV Dakota|Dakota]]|clubnat=ARU}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Rovien Ostiana]]|age={{birth date and age|2002|2|14|df=y}}|caps=17|goals=8|club=[[TOGB]]|clubnat=NED}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Kymani Nedd]]|age={{birth date and age|2004|06|10|df=y}}|caps=17|goals=0|club=[[VV Zwaluwen]]|clubnat=NED}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Diederick Luydens]]|age={{birth date and age|1999|2|18|df=y}}|caps=14|goals=2|club=[[SV Dakota|Dakota]]|clubnat=ARU}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Darryl Bäly]]|age={{birth date and age|1998|01|19|df=y}}|caps=8|goals=1|club=[[FC Lisse|Lisse]]|clubnat=NED}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Bradley Martis]]|age={{birth date and age|1998|07|13|df=yes}}|caps=5|goals=0|club=[[IJsselmeervogels]]|clubnat=NED}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Rainey Breinburg]]|age={{birth date and age|2005|8|5|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=1|club=[[Excelsior Rotterdam|Excelsior]] U21|clubnat=NED}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Gladwin Curiel]]|age={{birth date and age|2002|3|24|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[FC Prishtina]]|clubnat=KOS}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Walter Bennett (footballer, born 1997)|Walter Bennett]]|age={{birth date and age|1997|03|18|df=y}}|caps=25|goals=2|club=[[SC Feyenoord]]|clubnat=NED}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Jaybrien Romano]]|age={{birth date and age|2004|12|13|df=y}}|caps=9|goals=3|club=[[RKSV Halsteren|Halsteren]]|clubnat=NED}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Dimaggio Senchi]]|age={{birth date and age|1995|5|3|df=y}}|caps=8|goals=0|club=[[AFC '34]]|clubnat=NED}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Conner van Kilsdonk]]|age={{birth date and age|2006|9|24|df=y}}|caps=3|goals=1|club=[[TOP Oss]]|clubnat=NED}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Quinlan Poulina]]|age={{birth date and age|2003|2|20|df=y}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[FC Lisse|Lisse]]|clubnat=NED}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Gianni Vandepitte]]|age={{birth date and age|2000|7|3|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[VV Kloetinge|Kloetinge]]|clubnat=NED}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Javier Jiménez (footballer, born 2000)|Javier Jiménez]]|age={{birth date and age|2000|5|27|df=y}}|caps=14|goals=2|club=[[BSV Schwarz-Weiß Rehden|Schwarz-Weiß Rehden]]|clubnat=GER}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Jayden Kruydenhof]]|age={{birth date and age|2006|12|18|df=y}}|caps=8|goals=1|club=[[SC Cambuur|Cambuur]]|clubnat=NED}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Mishawn Molina]]|age={{birth date and age|2005|1|16|df=y}}|caps=4|goals=1|club=[[Willem II Tilburg|Willem II]] U21|clubnat=NED}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Carlito Fermina]]|age={{birth date and age|2000|1|6|df=y}}|caps=3|goals=1|club=[[Kozakken Boys]]|clubnat=NED}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Gello Robertha]]|age={{birth date and age|2004|9|6|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=1|club=[[IJsselmeervogels]]|clubnat=NED}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Arenchelo Leito]]|age={{birth date and age|2002|11|12|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[RKAV Volendam]]|clubnat=NED}}
{{nat fs end}}

===Recent call-ups===
The following players have been called up by the national squad within the last twelve months..
{{nat fs r start}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Jillroy Ruiz]]|age={{birth date and age|1996|10|18|df=yes}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[RVVH]]|clubnat=NED|latest=v. {{fb|BRB}}, 15 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Shivay Wadhwani]]|age={{birth date and age|2005|7|3|df=y}}|caps=4|goals=0|club=[[AVV Zeeburgia|Zeeburgia]]|clubnat=NED|latest=v. {{fb|BRB}}, 15 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=12|pos=DF|name=[[Edhyon Hersilia]]|age={{birth date and age|2006|04|11|df=yes}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[SV Britannia|Britannia]]|clubnat=ARU|latest=v. {{fb|HAI}}, 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Jonathan Richard]]|age={{birth date and age|1991|06|21|df=y}}|caps=8|goals=0|club=[[ADO '20]]|clubnat=NED|latest=v. {{fb|HAI}}, 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Justin Figaroa]]|age={{birth date and age|2005|3|22|df=yes}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Grand View Vikings]]|clubnat=USA|latest=v. {{fb|BRB}}, 15 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Ezekiel Frans]]|age={{birth date and age|2003|11|22|df=yes}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[CD San Roque de Lepe|San Roque de Lepe]]|clubnat=ESP|latest=v. {{fb|BRB}}, 15 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Ethan Tromp]]|age={{birth date and age|2002|1|17|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[SV Britannia]]|clubnat=ARU|latest=v. {{fb|BRB}}, 15 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=20|pos=MF|name=[[Isaï Marselia]]|age={{birth date and age|2001|06|17|df=y}}|caps=9|goals=1|club=[[Sporting Khalsa F.C.|Sporting Khalsa]]|clubnat=ENG|latest=v. {{fb|HAI}}, 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Steven Rua]]|age={{birth date and age|1990|5|12|df=y}}|caps=16|goals=0|club=[[SV Britannia|Britannia]]|clubnat=ARU|latest=v. {{fb|HAI}}, 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=9|pos=FW|name=[[Terence Groothusen]]|age={{birth date and age|1996|9|16|df=y}}|caps=22|goals=4|club=[[ADO '20]]|clubnat=NED|latest=v. {{fb|BRB}}, 15 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Jahrdell Constancia]]|age={{birth date and age|2000|8|16|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[VV Goes|Goes]]|clubnat=NED|latest=v. {{fb|BRB}}, 15 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=14|pos=FW|name=[[Alljereau Mercera]]|age={{birth date and age|2002|05|03|df=yes}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[VV Katwijk|Katwijk]]|clubnat=NED|latest=v. {{fb|HAI}}, 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=19|pos=FW|name=[[Nathan La Cruz]]|age={{birth date and age|2006|05|09|df=yes}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[VVV-Venlo]]|clubnat=NED|latest=v. {{fb|HAI}}, 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=22|pos=FW|name=[[Benjamin Maria]]|age={{birth date and age|2001|09|19|df=y}}|caps=9|goals=2|club=[[VV DUNO]]|clubnat=NED|latest=v. {{fb|HAI}}, 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs end}}

==Player records==
{{updated|28 May 2026}}<ref>{{cite web |title=Aruba |url=https://www.national-football-teams.com/country/11/Aruba.html |website=National Football Teams |access-date=7 June 2022 |archive-date=3 April 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20230403182905/https://www.national-football-teams.com/country/11/2023/Aruba.html |url-status=live }}</ref>
:''Players in '''bold''' are still active with Aruba''.

===Most appearances===

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
! style="width:150px;"|Player
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Goals
! style="width:100px;"|Career
|-
|1
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Nickenson Paul]]'''
|35
|0
|2014–present
|-
|2
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Eric Abdul]]
|28
|0
|2011–2023
|-
|3
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Walter Bennett (footballer, born 1997)|Walter Bennett]]'''
|25
|2
|2018–present
|-
|4
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Theric Ruiz]]
|24
|1
|2004–2016
|-
|rowspan=3|5
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Erik Santos de Gouveia]]
|22
|3
|2011–2021
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Matthew Lentink]]'''
|22
|0
|2014–present
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Terence Groothusen]]'''
|22
|4
|2019–present
|-
|8
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Francois Croes]]
|21
|0
|2008–2021
|-
|9
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Ronald Gómez (Aruban footballer)|Ronald Gómez]]
|20
|5
|2002–2021
|-
|10
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Leroy Oehlers]]
|19
|0
|2013–2019
|-
|}

===Top goalscorers===

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
! style="width:150px;"|Player
!width=50px|Goals
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Ratio
! style="width:100px;"|Career
|-
|1
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Rovien Ostiana]]'''
|8
|17
|{{#expr:8/17 round 2}}
|2023–present
|-
|rowspan=2|2
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Glenroy Lake]]
|5
|6
|{{#expr:5/6 round 2}}
|1995–2002
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Ronald Gómez (Aruban footballer)|Ronald Gómez]]
|5
|20
|{{#expr:5/20 round 2}}
|2002–2021
|-
|rowspan=5|4
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Wander Gross]]
|4
|5
|{{#expr:4/5 round 2}}
|2000–2001
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Joshua John]]
|4
|8
|{{#expr:4/8 round 2}}
|2018–2023
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Dwayn Alex Raven]]
|4
|8
|{{#expr:4/8 round 2}}
|2012–2015
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Rensy Barradas]]
|4
|11
|{{#expr:4/11 round 2}}
|2011–2015
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Terence Groothusen]]'''
|4
|22
|{{#expr:6/24 round 2}}
|2019–present
|-
|rowspan=6|8
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Lesley Felomina]]
|3
|4
|{{#expr:3/4 round 2}}
|2000–2001
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Jaybrien Romano]]'''
|3
|9
|{{#expr:3/9 round 2}}
|2023–present
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Maurice Escalona]]
|3
|10
|{{#expr:3/10 round 2}}
|2004–2014
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Annuar Kock]]
|3
|14
|{{#expr:3/14 round 2}}
|2011–2019
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Raymond Baten]]
|3
|16
|{{#expr:3/16 round 2}}
|2011–2019
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Erik Santos de Gouveia]]
|3
|22
|{{#expr:3/22 round 2}}
|2011–2021
|-
|}

==Competitive record==
===FIFA World Cup===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!colspan=10|[[FIFA World Cup]] record
!rowspan=15|
!colspan=6|[[FIFA World Cup qualification|Qualification]] record
|-
!Year
!Round
!{{Tooltip|Pos.|Position}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!Squad
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
|[[1930 FIFA World Cup|1930]] to [[1986 FIFA World Cup|1986]]||colspan=9|''Part of {{flag|Netherlands Antilles|1959}}''
|colspan=6|''Part of {{flag|Netherlands Antilles|1959}}''
|-
|[[1990 FIFA World Cup|1990]] and [[1994 FIFA World Cup|1994]]||colspan=9|''Did not participate''
|colspan=6|''Did not participate''
|-
|{{flagicon|France|1974}} [[1998 FIFA World Cup|1998]]||colspan=9 rowspan=8|''Did not qualify''
|2||0||0||2||3||6
|-
|{{flagicon|South Korea|1997}} {{flagicon|Japan}} [[2002 FIFA World Cup|2002]]
|4||1||1||2||7||11
|-
|{{flagicon|Germany}} [[2006 FIFA World Cup|2006]]
|2||0||0||2||2||10
|-
|{{flagicon|South Africa}} [[2010 FIFA World Cup|2010]]
|2||0||0||2||0||4
|-
|{{flagicon|Brazil}} [[2014 FIFA World Cup|2014]]
|2||1||0||1||6||6
|-
|{{flagicon|Russia}} [[2018 FIFA World Cup|2018]]
|4||2||0||2||5||5
|-
|{{flagicon|Qatar}} [[2022 FIFA World Cup|2022]]
|4||1||0||3||3||19
|-
|{{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|Mexico}} {{flagicon|United States}} [[2026 FIFA World Cup|2026]]
|4||0||2||2||3||10
|-
|{{flagicon|Morocco}} {{flagicon|Portugal}} {{flagicon|Spain}} [[2030 FIFA World Cup|2030]]||colspan=9 rowspan=2|''To be determined''
|colspan=6 rowspan=2|''To be determined''
|-
|{{flagicon|Saudi Arabia}} [[2034 FIFA World Cup|2034]]
|-
!Total!!—!!0/8!!colspan=7|—
!24!!5!!3!!16!!29!!71
|}

===CONCACAF Gold Cup===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!colspan=10|[[CONCACAF Championship]] / [[CONCACAF Gold Cup|Gold Cup]] record
!rowspan=22|
!colspan=6|[[CONCACAF Gold Cup qualification|Qualification]] record
|-
!Year
!Round
!{{Tooltip|Pos.|Position}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!Squad
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
|[[1963 CONCACAF Championship|1963]] to [[1985 CONCACAF Championship|1985]]||colspan=9|''Part of {{flag|Netherlands Antilles|1959}}''
|colspan=6|''Part of {{flag|Netherlands Antilles|1959}}''
|-
|[[1989 CONCACAF Championship|1989]] and [[1991 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1991]]||colspan=9|''Did not participate''
|colspan=6|''Did not participate''
|-
|{{flagicon|Mexico}} {{flagicon|USA}} [[1993 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1993]]||colspan=9|''Withdrew''
|colspan=6|''Withdrew''
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[1996 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1996]]||colspan=9 rowspan=5|''Did not qualify''
|2
|0
|0
|2
|5
|7
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[1998 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1998]]
|2
|1
|0
|1
|2
|7
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[2000 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2000]]
|3
|1
|1
|1
|4
|4
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[2002 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2002]]
|3
|0
|0
|3
|4
|14
|-
|{{flagicon|Mexico}} {{flagicon|United States}} [[2003 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2003]]
|2
|0
|0
|2
|0
|8
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[2005 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2005]]||colspan=9|''Withdrew''
|colspan=6|''Withdrew''
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[2007 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2007]]||colspan=9|''Did not participate''
|colspan=6|''Did not participate''
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[2009 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2009]]||colspan=9|''Did not qualify''
|2
|0
|1
|1
|1
|3
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[2011 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2011]]||colspan=9|''Did not participate''
|colspan=6|''Did not participate''
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[2013 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2013]]||colspan=9 rowspan=7|''Did not qualify''
|3
|0
|1
|2
|5
|7
|-
|{{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|United States}} [[2015 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2015]]
|3
|2
|0
|1
|8
|2
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[2017 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2017]]
|2
|0
|0
|2
|1
|4
|-
|{{flagicon|Costa Rica}} {{flagicon|Jamaica}} {{flagicon|United States}} [[2019 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2019]]
|4
|1
|1
|2
|5
|6
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[2021 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2021]]
|6
|0
|0
|6
|5
|18
|-
|{{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|United States}} [[2023 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2023]]
|4
|1
|1
|2
|5
|5
|-
|{{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|United States}} [[2025 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2025]]
|6
|0
|0
|6
|5
|17
|-
!Total!!—!!0/13!!colspan=7|—
!40!!6!!5!!29!!43!!102
|}

===CONCACAF Nations League===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!colspan=22|[[CONCACAF Nations League]] record
|-
!colspan=11|League phase
!rowspan=8|
!colspan=10|Final phase
|-
!Season
!{{Tooltip|Div.|Division}}
!Group
!{{Tooltip|Pos.|Position}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|P/R|Promotion/Relegation}}
!Finals
!Round
!{{Tooltip|Pos.|Position}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|Squad|Finals Squad Only}}
|-
|[[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League|2019−20]]
|[[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League B|B]]
|[[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League B#Group C|C]]
|16th||6||0||0||6||5||18||{{fall}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2021 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2021]]||colspan=9 rowspan=5|''Ineligible''
|-
|[[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League|2022–23]]
|[[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League C|C]]
|[[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League C#Group B|B]]
|6th||4||1||1||2||5||5||{{same position}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2023 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2023]]
|-
|[[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League|2023–24]]
|[[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League C|C]]
|[[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League C#Group B|B]]
|2nd||4||4||0||0||14||4||{{rise}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2024 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2024]]
|-
|[[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League|2024–25]]
|[[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League B|B]]
|[[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League B#Group C|C]]
|16th||6||0||0||6||5||17||{{fall}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2025 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2025]]
|-
|[[2026–27 CONCACAF Nations League|2026–27]]
|[[2026–27 CONCACAF Nations League C|C]]||colspan=9|''To be determined''
|[[2027 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2027]]
|-
!colspan=4|Total!!20!!5!!1!!14!!29!!44!!—
!Total!!colspan=9|—
|}
{| class="wikitable collapsible collapsed" style="text-align:center; font-size:90%;"
|-
!colspan=2|CONCACAF Nations League history
|-
!First match
|{{fb|GUY}} 1–0 {{fb-rt|ARU}}<br>(6 September 2019; [[Willemstad]], Curaçao)
|-
!Biggest Win
|{{fb-rt|ARU}} 3–0 {{fb|SMN}}<br>(6 June 2022; [[Willemstad]], Curaçao)<br>{{fb-rt|ARU}} 4–1 {{fb|VIR}}<br>(16 November 2023; [[Christiansted, U.S. Virgin Islands|Christiansted]], U.S. Virgin Islands)
|-
!Biggest Defeat
|{{fb|JAM}} 6–0 {{fb-rt|ARU}}<br>(15 October 2019; [[Willemstad]], Curaçao)
|-
!Best Result
|2nd – League C ([[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League#League C|2023–24]])
|-
!Worst Result
|Relegation League C ([[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League#League B|2019–20]], [[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League#League B|2024–25]])
|}

===Caribbean Cup===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!colspan=9|[[CFU Championship]] / [[Caribbean Cup]] record 
|rowspan=23|
!colspan=6|Qualification record
|-
!Year
!Round
!{{Tooltip|Pos.|Position}}
!{{Abbr|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Abbr|W|Won}}
!{{Abbr|D|Drawn}}
!{{Abbr|L|Lost}}
!{{Abbr|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Abbr|GA|Goals against}}
!Pld
!W
!D
!L
!GF
!GA
|-
|[[1978 CFU Championship|1978]] to [[1985 CFU Championship|1985]]||colspan=8|''Part of {{flag|Netherlands Antilles}}''
|colspan=6|''Part of {{flag|Netherlands Antilles}}''
|-
|[[1988 CFU Championship|1988]]||colspan=8|''Did not participate''
|colspan=6|''Did not participate''
|-
|{{flagicon|BAR}} [[1989 Caribbean Cup|1989]]||colspan=9 rowspan=2|''Did not qualify''
||4||0||1||3||1||19
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1990 Caribbean Cup|1990]]
||2||0||1||1||3||4
|-
|{{flagicon|JAM}} [[1991 Caribbean Cup|1991]]||colspan=8|''Did not participate''
|colspan=6|''Did not participate''
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1992 Caribbean Cup|1992]]||colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
||3||0||0||3||0||10
|-
|[[1993 Caribbean Cup|1993]] and [[1994 Caribbean Cup|1994]]||colspan=8|''Did not participate''
|colspan=6|''Did not participate''
|-
|{{flagicon|CAY}} {{flagicon|JAM}} [[1995 Caribbean Cup|1995]]||colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
||2||0||0||2||5||7
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1996 Caribbean Cup|1996]]||colspan=8|''Did not participate''
|colspan=6|''Did not participate''
|-
|{{flagicon|ATG}} {{flagicon|SKN}} [[1997 Caribbean Cup|1997]]||colspan=8 rowspan=2|''Did not qualify''
||2||1||0||1||2||7
|-
|{{flagicon|JAM}} {{flagicon|TRI}} [[1998 Caribbean Cup|1998]]
||3||1||1||1||4||4
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1999 Caribbean Cup|1999]]||colspan=8|''Withdrew''
|colspan=6|''Withdrew''
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[2001 Caribbean Cup|2001]]||colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
||3||0||0||3||4||14
|-
|{{flagicon|BRB}} [[2005 Caribbean Cup|2005]]||colspan=9|''Withdrew''
|colspan=6|''Withdrew''
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[2007 Caribbean Cup|2007]]||colspan=8|''Did not participate''
|colspan=6|''Did not participate''
|-
|{{flagicon|JAM}} [[2008 Caribbean Cup|2008]]||colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
||2||0||1||1||1||3
|-
|{{flagicon|MTQ|snake}} [[2010 Caribbean Cup|2010]]||colspan=8|''Did not participate''
|colspan=6|''Did not participate''
|-
|{{flagicon|ATG}} [[2012 Caribbean Cup|2012]]||colspan=8 rowspan=3|''Did not qualify''
||3||0||1||2||5||7
|-
|{{flagicon|JAM}} [[2014 Caribbean Cup|2014]]
||3||2||0||1||8||2
|-
|{{flagicon|MTQ|snake}} [[2017 Caribbean Cup|2017]]
||2||0||0||2||1||4
|-
!Total!!—!!0/11!!colspan=7|—
!29!!4!!5!!20!!34!!83
|}

===CCCF Championship===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!colspan=10|[[CCCF Championship]] record
|-
!Year
!Round
!Pos.
!Pld
!W
!D
!L
!GF
!GA
!Squad
|-
|{{flagicon|HON|1949}} [[1955 CCCF Championship|1955]]
|Round-robin||5th||6||2||1||3||9||9||[[1955 CCCF Championship squads#Aruba|Squad]]
|-
!Total!!Fifth place!!1/1!!6!!2!!1!!3!!9!!9!!—
|}

===ABCS Tournament===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!colspan=9|[[ABCS Tournament]] record
|-
!Year
!Round
!Pos.
!Pld
!W
!D
!L
!GF
!GA
|- bgcolor=#c96
| {{flagicon|CUR}} [[ABCS Tournament#ABCS Tournament 2010|2010]]
|'''Third place'''||'''3rd'''||'''2'''||'''0'''||'''1'''||'''1'''||'''3'''||'''6'''
|- bgcolor=silver
| {{flagicon|SUR}} [[ABCS Tournament#ABCS Tournament 2011|2011]]
|'''Runners-up'''||'''2nd'''||'''2'''||'''0'''||'''2'''||'''0'''||'''2'''||'''2'''
|- bgcolor=gold
|style="border: 3px solid red"| {{flagicon|ARU}} [[ABCS Tournament#ABCS Tournament 2012|2012]]
|'''Champions'''||'''1st'''||'''2'''||'''2'''||'''0'''||'''0'''||'''4'''||'''2'''
|- bgcolor=#9acdff
| {{flagicon|CUR}} [[ABCS Tournament#ABCS Tournament 2013|2013]]
|Fourth place||4th||2||0||0||2||1||4
|- bgcolor=silver
| {{flagicon|SUR}} [[ABCS Tournament#ABCS Tournament 2015|2015]]||'''Runners-up'''||'''2nd'''||'''2'''||'''0'''||'''1'''||'''1'''||'''0'''||'''1'''
|- bgcolor=#c96
| {{flagicon|CUR}} [[ABCS Tournament#ABCS Tournament 2021|2021]]||'''Third place'''||'''3rd'''||'''2'''||'''0'''||'''1'''||'''1'''||'''3'''||'''9'''
|- bgcolor=#c96
| {{flagicon|CUR}} [[ABCS Tournament#ABCS Tournament 2022|2022]]||'''Third place'''||'''3rd'''||'''2'''||'''1'''||'''1'''||'''0'''||'''3'''||'''2'''
|-
!Total!!1 Title!!7/7!!14!!3!!6!!5!!16!!26
|}

==Head-to-head record==

Note: teams that are in ''italics'' indicates that the team is a historical team of a polity not existing anymore, or a team which is not a [[FIFA]] member.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.eloratings.net/Aruba|title=World Football Elo Ratings|website=www.eloratings.net|language=en|access-date=2018-11-09|archive-date=20 November 2018|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20181120070734/http://www.eloratings.net/Aruba|url-status=live}}</ref>

''As of 6 June 2026''<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.eloratings.net/Aruba|title=World Football Elo Ratings: Aruba|website=Elo Ratings|access-date=23 March 2019|archive-date=24 March 2019|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190324180227/http://www.eloratings.net/Aruba|url-status=live}}</ref>

''These all-time records are exclusively class 'A' internationals matches''.<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.11v11.com/teams/aruba/tab/stats|title=Aruba national football team statistics and records: All-time record|publisher=11v11.com|access-date=26 May 2020|archive-date=31 August 2021|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20210831090629/https://www.11v11.com/teams/aruba/tab/stats/|url-status=live}}</ref>

{| class="wikitable sortable" text-align="center"
! Against
! Played
! Won
! Drawn
! Lost
! GF
! GA
! GD
!Confederation
|- bgcolor=#fdd
| align="left" |{{fb|Antigua and Barbuda}}|| 6 || 0 || 1 || 5 || 4 || 11 || −7
|[[CONCACAF]] 
|- bgcolor=#fdd
| align="left" |{{fb|Barbados}}|| 8 || 2 || 1 || 5 || 11 || 17 || −6
|[[CONCACAF]] 
|- bgcolor=#ffd
| align="left" |{{fb|Bermuda}}|| 2 || 1 || 0 || 1 || 3 || 6 || –3
|[[CONCACAF]] 
|- bgcolor=#dfd
| align="left" |{{fb|British Virgin Islands}}|| 1 || 1 || 0 || 0 || 7 || 0 || +7
|[[CONCACAF]] 
|- bgcolor=#dfd
| align="left" |{{fb|Cambodia}}|| 1 || 1 || 0 || 0 || 2 || 1 || +1
|[[Asian Football Confederation|AFC]]
|- bgcolor=#fdd
| align="left" |{{fb|Canada}}|| 1 || 0 || 0 || 1 || 0 || 7 || –7
|[[CONCACAF]] 
|- bgcolor=#dfd
| align="left" |{{fb|Cayman Islands}}|| 3 || 3 || 0 || 0 || 10 || 3 || +7
|[[CONCACAF]] 
|- bgcolor=#fdd
| align="left" |{{fb|Costa Rica}}|| 2 || 0 || 1 || 1 || 3 || 4 || −1
|[[CONCACAF]] 
|- bgcolor=#dfd
| align="left" |{{fb|Cuba}}|| 1 || 1 || 0 || 0 || 4 || 1 || +3
|[[CONCACAF]] 
|- bgcolor=#fdd
| align="left" |{{fb|Curaçao}}|| 29 || 1 || 9 || 17 || 22 || 57 || −35
|[[CONCACAF]] 
|- bgcolor=#fdd
| align="left" |{{fb|Dominica}}|| 1 || 0 || 0 || 1 || 2 || 3 || −1
|[[CONCACAF]] 
|- bgcolor=#fdd
| align="left" |{{fb|Dominican Republic}}|| 4 || 0 || 1 || 3 || 5 || 10|| −5
|[[CONCACAF]] 
|- bgcolor=#fdd
| align="left" |{{fb|El Salvador}}|| 1 || 0 || 0 || 1 || 0 || 2 || −2
|[[CONCACAF]] 
|- bgcolor=#fdd
| align="left" |''{{fb|French Guiana}}''|| 3 || 1 || 0 || 2 || 1 || 4 || −3
|[[CONCACAF]] 
|- bgcolor=#fdd
| align="left" |{{fb|Grenada}}|| 2 || 0 || 0 || 2 || 3 || 7 || −4
|[[CONCACAF]] 
|- bgcolor=#ffd
| align="left" |''{{fb|Guadeloupe}}''|| 1 || 0 || 1 || 0 || 0 || 0 || 0
|[[CONCACAF]] 
|- bgcolor=#dfd
| align="left" |{{fb|Guam}}|| 2 || 1 || 1 || 0 || 4 || 2 || +2
|[[Asian Football Confederation|AFC]]
|- bgcolor=#ffd
| align="left" |{{fb|Guatemala}}|| 1 || 0 || 1 || 0 || 0 || 0 || 0
|[[CONCACAF]] 
|- bgcolor=#fdd
| align="left" |{{fb|Guyana}}|| 4 || 0 || 0 || 4 || 2 || 12 || −10
|[[CONCACAF]] 
|- bgcolor=#fdd
| align="left" |{{fb|Haiti}}|| 4 || 0 || 1 || 3 || 5 || 14 || –9
|[[CONCACAF]] 
|- bgcolor=#ffd
| align="left" |{{fb|Honduras}}|| 1 || 0 || 1 || 0 || 1 || 1 || 0
|[[CONCACAF]] 
|- bgcolor=#fdd
| align="left" |{{fb|Jamaica}}|| 3 || 0 || 0 || 3 || 0 || 14 || −14
|[[CONCACAF]]
|- bgcolor=#dfd
| align="left" |{{fb|Liechtenstein}}|| 1 || 1 || 0 || 0 || 4 || 1 || +3
|[[UEFA]]
|- bgcolor=#dfd
| align="left" |{{fb|Macau}}|| 1 || 1 || 0 || 0 || 4 || 1 || +3
|[[Asian Football Confederation|AFC]]
|- bgcolor=#fdd
| align="left" |{{fb|Montserrat}}|| 1 || 0 || 0 || 1 || 0 || 2 || −2
|[[CONCACAF]] 
|- bgcolor=#fdd
| align="left" |''{{fb|Netherlands Antilles}}''|| 8 || 1 || 1 || 6 || 9 || 20 || −11
|[[CONCACAF]] 
|- bgcolor=#ffd
| align="left" |{{fb|Panama}}|| 1 || 0 || 1 || 0 || 0 || 0 || 0
|[[CONCACAF]] 
|- bgcolor=#fdd
| align="left" |{{fb|Puerto Rico}}|| 4 || 1 || 1 || 2 || 7 || 10 || –3
|[[CONCACAF]] 
|- bgcolor=#fdd
| align="left" |{{fb|Saint Kitts and Nevis}}|| 3 || 0 || 0 || 3 || 2 || 7 || −5
|[[CONCACAF]] 
|- bgcolor=#fdd
| align="left" |{{fb|Saint Lucia}}|| 4 || 1 || 1 || 2 || 10 || 11 || −1
|[[CONCACAF]] 
|- bgcolor=#dfd
| align="left" |''{{fb|Saint Martin}}''|| 2 || 1 || 1 || 0 || 3 || 0 || +3
|[[CONCACAF]] 
|- bgcolor=#ffd
| align="left" |{{fb|Saint Vincent and the Grenadines}}|| 2 || 1 || 0 || 1 || 2 || 3 || −1
|[[CONCACAF]] 
|- bgcolor=#fdd
| align="left" |''{{fb|Sint Maarten}}''|| 2 || 0 || 0 || 2 || 0 || 3 || −3
|[[CONCACAF]] 
|- bgcolor=#fdd
| align="left" |{{fb|Suriname}}|| 13 || 1 || 2 || 10 || 6 || 46 || −40
|[[CONCACAF]] 
|- bgcolor=#fdd
| align="left" |{{fb|Trinidad and Tobago}}|| 1 || 0 || 0 || 1 || 0 || 11 || −11
|[[CONCACAF]] 
|- bgcolor=#dfd
| align="left" |{{fb|Turks and Caicos Islands}}|| 1 || 1 || 0 || 0 || 1 || 0 || +1
|[[CONCACAF]] 
|- bgcolor=#dfd
| align="left" |{{fb|U.S. Virgin Islands}}|| 2 || 2 || 0 || 0 || 7 || 2 || +5
|[[CONCACAF]] 
|- bgcolor=#fdd
| align="left" |{{fb|Venezuela}}|| 2 || 0 || 0 || 2 || 1 || 6 || −5
|[[CONMEBOL]]
|- class="sortbottom"
! Total !!115!!20!!25!!75!!139!!278!!−138
![[FIFA]]
|}

==Honours==
===Friendly===
*'''[[ABCS Tournament]]'''
**{{gold1}} '''Champions (1):''' [[ABCS Tournament#ABCS Tournament 2012|2012]]
*'''[[FIFA Series]]'''
**{{gold1}} '''Champions (1):''' [[2026 FIFA Series (men's matches)#Rwanda B|2026 Rwanda B]]<ref>{{cite web |author=<!-- not stated --> |date=March 29, 2026 |title=Roberta dazzles as Aruba conquer |url=https://www.fifa.com/en/tournaments/series/articles/aruba-champions-tanzania-third |website=fifa.com |location= |publisher=[[FIFA]] |access-date=April 4, 2026}}</ref>

==References==
{{Reflist}}

==External links==
*[https://web.archive.org/web/20070607013803/http://www.fifa.com/associations/association=aru/index.html Country profile] – FIFA
*[http://www.national-football-teams.com/v2/country.php?id=11 Country roster]&nbsp;– National Football Teams
*[https://web.archive.org/web/20090413010348/http://www.sportsaruba.com/content/view/946/1/ Team 2008]
*[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xqHpEDK150U Netherlands Antilles vs Aruba, Digicel Caribbean Championships 2008, YouTube]
*[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=n0YKbVQPMXg Grenada vs Aruba, Digicel Caribbean Championships 2008, YouTube]

{{Aruba national football team}}
{{Football in Aruba}}
{{CONCACAF teams}}
{{National sports teams of Aruba}}

{{DEFAULTSORT:Aruba National Football Team}}
[[Category:Aruba national football team| ]]
[[Category:Caribbean national association football teams]]
[[Category:1924 establishments in Aruba]]
[[Category:National sports teams established in 1924]]
